message:
test(core): expand flake triage with artifact scanning, reproduction, and multi-seed runners

Flake triage (br-36xx, br-1kk7, br-154k):
- Add ScannedArtifact type and scan_artifacts() for recursively discovering
  failure_context.json files with timestamp-sorted output
- Add reproduce_failure() to reconstruct repro commands from artifact files,
  replaying captured seeds and environment variables as subprocess
- Add MultiSeedConfig and run_multi_seed_subprocess() for subprocess-based
  multi-seed flake detection with configurable packages and timeout
- Add extend_seeds() deterministic PRNG (splitmix64) to grow seed corpus
  to arbitrary size without duplicates
- 15+ artifact scanning/reproduction/seed extension tests

Disk monitoring (disk.rs):
- Tests for min_opt combinations, normalize_probe_path fallback behavior,
  sample_disk threshold classification, and sample_and_record metrics update

Identity (identity.rs):
- Edge case tests: Windows separators, relative path components, trailing
  slashes, very long paths, short_sha1 distinctness, SCP-style remote URLs,
  remote URL normalization with duplicate slashes, resolve_project_identity
  and compute_project_slug for existing paths

Memory (memory.rs):
- sample_and_record_updates_memory_metrics test verifying RSS, pressure
  level, last sample timestamp, and error count metric propagation

SLO (slo.rs):
- Pool health large value classification, OpClass budget ordering
  invariant verification across Read/Tool/Send/SendAttach

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
